title: campylospermum anceps
intro: Campylospermum anceps is a species of flowering plant in the family Ochnaceae, native to tropical Africa. This plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can be used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Campylospermum anceps include reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating skin conditions such as wounds and eczema. In traditional medicine, the plant can be prepared into various herbal preparations, including infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat a range of ailments.
